API docs by Redocly

中亚胡杨林生态系统保护数据共享平台 API (0.1.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

API Support: support@huyang.example.com License: MIT

中亚胡杨林生态系统保护数据共享平台后端接口文档。

认证方式

本平台使用 Django Session 认证机制：

  1. GET /api/auth/csrf/ 获取 CSRF Token
  2. POST /api/auth/login/ 登录建立 Session
  3. 后续请求携带 sessionid Cookie 和 X-CSRFToken 请求头

权限体系

  • 功能权限：30 余项细粒度功能权限，通过用户组分配，按后台权限、日志权限、概览权限、数据权限、人员权限分组管理
  • 数据访问权限：基于 access_groups 的数据隔离

错误处理

所有错误响应包含 detail 字段描述错误原因。 API 接口不会返回登录页 HTML：未认证请求返回 JSON 401，CSRF 校验失败返回 JSON 403。

公共接口

无需认证的公共接口

获取系统启动配置

获取前端应用初始化所需的全局配置信息

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/bootstrap/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/bootstrap/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "systemName": "中亚胡杨林生态系统保护数据共享平台",
  • "allowRegistration": true,
  • "map": {
    • "defaultCenter": [
      • 87.6,
      • 41.7
      ],
    • "defaultZoom": 6.5,
    • "defaultBasemap": "mapbox://styles/mapbox/satellite-streets-v12",
    • "mapboxAccessToken": "string"
    },
  • "limits": {
    • "uploadMaxMb": 500,
    • "queryResultLimit": 30000,
    • "maxRasterSidePixels": 10000
    }
}

获取登录页平台概览

返回登录页首屏需要公开展示的平台品牌、数据统计、能力标签、服务状态和版本信息。 该接口用于替换前端登录页中的静态展示数据，便于前后端分离开发时统一统计口径。 接口无需登录，但不得返回敏感路径、内部配置、具体用户、权限组、服务器资源明细或未公开数据清单。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/login/overview/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/login/overview/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "generatedAt": "2026-06-15T10:30:00+08:00",
  • "platform": {
    • "chineseName": "中亚胡杨林生态系统保护数据共享平台",
    • "englishName": "Central Asia Poplar Forest Ecosystem Data Platform",
    • "abbreviation": "CAPFED",
    • "edition": "CAPFED-WebGIS Research Edition",
    • "version": "v1.0.0"
    },
  • "hero": {
    • "badge": "生态保护数据共享平台",
    • "summary": "平台集成遥感影像、空间矢量、野外样方、长期监测与生态专题数据，提供统一编目、三维地理可视化、综合查询分析和共享服务。",
    • "capabilityTags": [
      • "遥感影像",
      • "矢量边界",
      • "野外样方",
      • "长期监测",
      • "生态专题"
      ]
    },
  • "metrics": [
    • {
      • "id": "dataResources",
      • "label": "数据资源",
      • "value": 1286,
      • "displayValue": "1,286",
      • "note": "空间、表格、文档",
      • "updatedAt": "2026-06-15T10:30:00+08:00"
      },
    • {
      • "id": "dataResources",
      • "label": "数据资源",
      • "value": 1286,
      • "displayValue": "1,286",
      • "note": "空间、表格、文档",
      • "updatedAt": "2026-06-15T10:30:00+08:00"
      },
    • {
      • "id": "dataResources",
      • "label": "数据资源",
      • "value": 1286,
      • "displayValue": "1,286",
      • "note": "空间、表格、文档",
      • "updatedAt": "2026-06-15T10:30:00+08:00"
      },
    • {
      • "id": "dataResources",
      • "label": "数据资源",
      • "value": 1286,
      • "displayValue": "1,286",
      • "note": "空间、表格、文档",
      • "updatedAt": "2026-06-15T10:30:00+08:00"
      }
    ],
  • "serviceStatus": {
    • "title": "平台服务状态",
    • "headline": "资源目录已接入 · 图层服务可用 · 权限认证开启",
    • "description": "登录后可按账号权限进入数据目录、地图工作台与后台管理功能。",
    • "services": [
      • {
        • "id": "resourceCatalog",
        • "label": "资源目录",
        • "status": "normal",
        • "description": "已完成公开资源目录索引统计。"
        }
      ],
    • "nodeSummary": {
      • "total": 24,
      • "normal": 21,
      • "warning": 2,
      • "risk": 1,
      • "legend": [
        • {
          • "status": "normal",
          • "label": "正常",
          • "count": 21
          }
        ]
      }
    },
  • "footer": {
    • "statisticsNotice": "统计口径已接入后端平台概览接口"
    }
}

健康检查

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/health/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/health/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "ok",
  • "configLoaded": true,
  • "configFormat": "toml",
  • "appSubdirs": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "researchSubdirs": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

获取地图缩略图同源瓦片

返回右侧当前视角平面缩略图使用的底图瓦片。浏览器只请求平台同源地址， 由服务器按当前 application.map 配置代理 Mapbox 或 OSM 瓦片并缓存到应用数据目录。 成功瓦片会缓存到应用数据目录，缓存命中时按图片文件头保留真实 MIME 类型。 当外部瓦片源暂时不可达且本地无缓存时，服务器返回本地生成的 Web Mercator 2D 世界地图瓦片， 保证客户端不会因为第三方瓦片域名访问失败而显示黑屏或前端内置兜底图。

path Parameters
z
required
integer [ 0 .. 12 ]

Web Mercator 瓦片层级，范围 0-12。

x
required
integer >= 0

Web Mercator 瓦片 X 坐标，必须在指定层级有效范围内。

y
required
integer >= 0

Web Mercator 瓦片 Y 坐标，必须在指定层级有效范围内。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/map/thumbnail-tiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.png

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/map/thumbnail-tiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.png

Response samples

  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "请求参数错误"
}

认证接口

用户认证相关接口

获取 CSRF Cookie

设置 csrftoken Cookie，后续所有非 GET 请求需读取此 Cookie 值

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/auth/csrf/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/auth/csrf/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "string"
}

用户登录

Request Body schema: application/json
required
username
required
string

用户名

password
required
string <password>

密码，至少 6 位

remember
boolean
Default: false

是否使用持久会话

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/auth/login/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/auth/login/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "username": "string",
  • "password": "pa$$word",
  • "remember": false
}

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "user": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "avatarUrl": "string",
    • "department": "string",
    • "isStaff": true,
    • "isSuperuser": true,
    • "roles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "permissions": {
      • "canAccessAdmin": true,
      • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
      • "canCreateUser": true,
      • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,

      • "canManageAuth": true,

      • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,

      • "canViewDataResources": true,

      • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
      • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
      • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,

      • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
      • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
      • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
      • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
      • "canManageRasterData": true
      },
    • "groupIds": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "isActive": true,
    • "groupPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],

      • "string"
      ],
    • "disabledPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "effectivePermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "operationLogGroupIds": [
      • 0
      ]
    }
}

游客登录

使用系统维护的专用 guest 账号建立游客会话。游客账号不可使用密码登录，只归属 游客 用户组；游客用户组默认不具备任何功能权限，管理员可在认证授权中调整游客角色权限。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/auth/guest-login/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/auth/guest-login/

  • 403

application/json

      ],

      • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,

用户注册

注册新用户。系统首次初始化会自动创建用户名为 admin 的完整功能账号和超级管理员用户组，注册用户保持普通账号。 注册功能受系统配置 allowRegistration 控制。

Request Body schema: application/json
required
username
required
string

用户名（唯一）

email
string <email>

邮箱

password
required
string <password>

密码

passwordConfirm
required
string <password>

确认密码

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/auth/register/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/auth/register/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "username": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "password": "pa$$word",
  • "passwordConfirm": "pa$$word"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{

数据目录

数据资源管理接口

获取甲方数据分类与数据库架子摘要

返回平台面向甲方确认数据类型的分类字典、数据库分层、核心实体和目录树建议。该接口用于前端展示数据管理体系和后续导入配置提示；需要 core.browse_data。当前接口只读，不创建或修改任何业务数据；分类字典包含其他类型，用于承接暂未归入专门专题的数据资源。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/data-schema/summary/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/data-schema/summary/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "domains": [
    • {
      • "code": "germplasm",
      • "name": "string",
      • "spatialClass": "spatial",
      • "description": "string",
      • "recommendedResourceTypes": [
        • "vector"
        ],
      • "coreEntities": [
        • "string"
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "layers": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "storage": "string",
      • "description": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "entities": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "label": "string",
      • "domainTypes": [
        • "germplasm"
        ],
      • "description": "string",
      • "keyFields": [
        • "string"
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "catalogTree": [
    • {
      • "code": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "domainType": "germplasm",
      • "spatialClass": "spatial",
      • "children": [
        • { }
        ]
      }
    ]
}

获取数据目录树

返回所有已激活的数据目录及其关联的数据资源

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/directories/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/directories/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "parentId": 0,
      • "description": "string",
      • "sortOrder": 0,
      • "resources": [
        • {
          • "id": 0,
          • "name": "string",
          • "code": "string",
          • "dataType": "vector",
          • "domainType": "germplasm",
          • "category": {
            • "id": 0,
            • "type": "string",
            • "code": "string",
            • "name": "string"
            },
          • "source": "string",
          • "provider": "string",
          • "dataDate": "2019-08-24",
          • "spatialExtent": "string",
          • "coordinateSystem": "string",
          • "fileFormat": "string",
          • "description": "string",
          • "qualityNote": "string",
          • "sizeBytes": 0,
          • "itemCount": 0,
          • "status": "active",
          • "isQueryable": true,
          • "isRenderable": true,
          • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
}

获取数据资源列表

支持多条件筛选的数据资源分页列表

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
q
string

按名称模糊搜索

dataType
string
Enum: "vector" "raster" "gene" "table" "document" "image"

数据类型筛选

domainType
string (DataDomainType)
Enum: "germplasm" "genome" "individual" "community" "population" "field_survey" "remote_sensing" "molecular" "other"

按平台确认的业务数据类型筛选，例如种质数据、个体数据、遥感影像数据、分子数据、基因组数据或其他类型；无效编码返回 400 ErrorResponse

category
string

分类代码精确匹配

source
string

数据来源模糊匹配

provider
string

提供者模糊匹配

dateFrom
string <date>

数据日期起始

dateTo
string <date>

数据日期截止

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/resources/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/resources/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "dataType": "vector",
      • "domainType": "germplasm",
      • "category": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "type": "string",
        • "code": "string",
        • "name": "string"
        },
      • "source": "string",
      • "provider": "string",
      • "dataDate": "2019-08-24",
      • "spatialExtent": "string",
      • "coordinateSystem": "string",
      • "fileFormat": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "qualityNote": "string",
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "itemCount": 0,
      • "status": "active",
      • "isQueryable": true,
      • "isRenderable": true,
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

扫描数据源

触发一次数据目录源扫描，发现并同步新的数据资源

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/scan/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/scan/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "dataType": "vector",
      • "domainType": "germplasm",
      • "category": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "type": "string",
        • "code": "string",
        • "name": "string"
        },
      • "source": "string",
      • "provider": "string",
      • "dataDate": "2019-08-24",
      • "spatialExtent": "string",
      • "coordinateSystem": "string",
      • "fileFormat": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "qualityNote": "string",
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "itemCount": 0,
      • "status": "active",
      • "isQueryable": true,
      • "isRenderable": true,
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "count": 0
}

获取工程和专题列表

返回当前登录用户私有保存的工程或专题工作台快照。需要 catalog.view_workspacescene，可按 kind 过滤工程或专题。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
kind
string
Enum: "project" "topic"

工作台快照类型；project 表示工程，topic 表示专题

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/workspaces/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/workspaces/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "kind": "project",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "snapshot": { },
      • "owner": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "username": "string",
        • "displayName": "string"
        },
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

保存工程或专题

将当前工作台图层树、顺序、显隐、查询条件、范围、资源引用和可视化方案保存为当前用户私有工程或专题；需要 catalog.add_workspacescene，不提交原始 GeoJSON 要素集合或查询结果数据本体。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
kind
required
string
Enum: "project" "topic"

保存类型

name
required
string

工程或专题名称

description
string

工程或专题说明

required
object (WorkspaceSceneSnapshot)

工作台轻量快照 JSON。前端只保存图层组、顺序、显隐、查询条件、空间范围、资源引用、符号化、栅格渲染引用元数据和视图状态；不得包含 geojson、FeatureCollection.features、属性表行或原始查询结果数据本体。后端拒绝含原始要素集合或超大请求体的快照。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/workspaces/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/workspaces/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "kind": "project",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "snapshot": { }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "kind": "project",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "snapshot": { },
  • "owner": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string"
    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

获取工程或专题详情

返回当前用户拥有的单个工程或专题快照。需要 catalog.view_workspacescene。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
workspaceId
required
integer

工程或专题 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/workspaces/{workspaceId}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/workspaces/{workspaceId}/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "kind": "project",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "snapshot": { },
  • "owner": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string"
    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

更新或删除工程专题

更新当前用户拥有的工程/专题轻量快照，或提交 action=delete 删除；更新需要 catalog.change_workspacescene，删除需要 catalog.delete_workspacescene，snapshot 不得包含原始 GeoJSON 要素集合或查询结果数据本体。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
workspaceId
required
integer

工程或专题 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
action
string
Value: "delete"

传 delete 时删除该工程或专题；不传时更新字段

kind
string
Enum: "project" "topic"

更新后的类型

name
string

更新后的名称

description
string

更新后的说明

object (WorkspaceSceneSnapshot)

工作台轻量快照 JSON。前端只保存图层组、顺序、显隐、查询条件、空间范围、资源引用、符号化、栅格渲染引用元数据和视图状态；不得包含 geojson、FeatureCollection.features、属性表行或原始查询结果数据本体。后端拒绝含原始要素集合或超大请求体的快照。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/workspaces/{workspaceId}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/workspaces/{workspaceId}/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "action": "delete",
  • "kind": "project",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "snapshot": { }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "kind": "project",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "snapshot": { },
  • "owner": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string"
    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

导入数据预检

解析上传的 Excel/CSV，Excel 会识别全部工作表并按当前工作表读取字段，自动推测经纬度列， 并返回样例行、字段列表、工作表清单、建议后台存储标识和建议数据名称是否重名。该接口不执行坐标数据校验，不写入数据。 需要 catalog.add_dataresource。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
file
required
string <binary>

.csv / .xls / .xlsx 文件

sheetName
string

可选；Excel 工作表名称。为空时默认读取第一张工作表。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/import/preview/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/import/preview/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "columns": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "rows": [
    • {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "rowCount": 0,
  • "suggestedTableName": "string",
  • "suggestedName": "string",
  • "activeSheetName": "string",
  • "sheets": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "rowCount": 0,
      • "columnCount": 0,
      • "isGeographic": true,
      • "longitudeColumn": "string",
      • "latitudeColumn": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "duplicateTarget": {
    • "targetType": "data_resource_name",
    • "targetName": "string",
    • "message": "string"
    },
  • "detected": {
    • "isGeographic": true,
    • "longitudeColumn": "string",
    • "latitudeColumn": "string",
    • "coordinateStats": {
      • "totalRows": 0,
      • "validRows": 0,
      • "missingRows": 0,
      • "quantizationErrorMeters": {
        • "min": 0,
        • "max": 0
        }
      },
    • "validationIssues": [
      • {
        • "code": "string",
        • "message": "string",
        • "blocking": true,
        • "count": 0,
        • "minMeters": 0,
        • "maxMeters": 0,
        • "ratio": 0,
        • "targetType": "data_resource_name",
        • "targetName": "string"
        }
      ]
    },
  • "limitations": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

上传数据校验

按当前表单选择的数据名称、工作表、导入类型、后台存储标识和经纬度列校验上传文件，不写入数据。重复检测按前端显示的数据名称执行。需要 catalog.add_dataresource。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
file
required
string <binary>

与预检一致的文件

payload
required
string

JSON 字符串，包含 name、sheetName、importMode、tableName、longitudeColumn、latitudeColumn；name 是前端显示的数据名称，用于同名数据检测；sheetName 是 Excel 工作表名称；tableName 是后台存储标识建议值。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/import/validate/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/import/validate/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "coordinateStats": {
    • "totalRows": 0,
    • "validRows": 0,
    • "missingRows": 0,
    • "quantizationErrorMeters": {
      • "min": 0,
      • "max": 0
      }
    },
  • "validationIssues": [
    • {
      • "code": "string",
      • "message": "string",
      • "blocking": true,
      • "count": 0,
      • "minMeters": 0,
      • "maxMeters": 0,
      • "ratio": 0,
      • "targetType": "data_resource_name",
      • "targetName": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "duplicateTarget": {
    • "targetType": "data_resource_name",
    • "targetName": "string",
    • "message": "string"
    }
}

提交数据导入

将预检后的 Excel/CSV 导入统一存储。选择地理数据时写入 GeoPackage， 选择非地理数据时写入 SQLite。接口每次导入都会生成唯一后台存储标识并创建新的 DataResource。 payload.domainType 是必填字段，必须使用 DataDomainType 枚举值；后端会将该值保存为 DataResource.domainType， 资源列表页和地理/非地理数据分类筛选均以该字段为准。 需要 catalog.add_dataresource；前端显示名已存在时必须在数据校验阶段确认，并在提交时显式传入 duplicateConfirmed=true 才允许继续导入。继续导入会创建新的 DataResource 和唯一后台存储标识，不覆盖已有数据。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
file
required
string <binary>
payload
required
string

JSON 字符串，包含导入配置；name 是前端显示的数据名称，domainType 是必填的平台确认业务数据类型，sheetName 是 Excel 工作表名称，tableName 是后台存储标识建议值，后端会在冲突时自动改写为唯一值；同名显示数据必须传 duplicateConfirmed=true 表示用户已在校验阶段确认重复名称；可包含 accessGroupIds 指定额外可见用户组，后端会强制补齐超级管理员用户组，上传者本人始终可见。domainType 缺失或编码无效时返回 400 ImportErrorResponse。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/import/commit/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/import/commit/

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "mode": "geographic",
  • "resourceId": 0,
  • "resourceName": "string",
  • "layerName": "string",
  • "tableName": "string",
  • "importedRows": 0,
  • "skippedRows": 0,
  • "bounds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "coordinateStats": {
    • "totalRows": 0,
    • "validRows": 0,
    • "missingRows": 0,
    • "quantizationErrorMeters": {
      • "min": 0,
      • "max": 0
      }
    },
  • "validationIssues": [
    • {
      • "code": "string",
      • "message": "string",
      • "blocking": true,
      • "count": 0,
      • "minMeters": 0,
      • "maxMeters": 0,
      • "ratio": 0,
      • "targetType": "data_resource_name",
      • "targetName": "string"
      }
    ]
}

获取数据资源详情

获取指定数据资源的元数据、字段信息及空间范围

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
id
required
integer

资源 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/resources/{id}/profile/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/resources/{id}/profile/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resource": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "code": "string",
    • "dataType": "vector",
    • "domainType": "germplasm",
    • "category": {
      • "id": 0,
      • "type": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "name": "string"
      },
    • "source": "string",
    • "provider": "string",
    • "dataDate": "2019-08-24",
    • "spatialExtent": "string",
    • "coordinateSystem": "string",
    • "fileFormat": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "qualityNote": "string",
    • "sizeBytes": 0,
    • "itemCount": 0,
    • "status": "active",
    • "isQueryable": true,
    • "isRenderable": true,
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "fields": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "nullable": true,
      • "sampleValues": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "description": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "featureCount": 0,
  • "geometryType": "string",
  • "bounds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "raster": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "code": "string",
    • "status": "pending",
    • "sourcePath": "string",
    • "processedPath": "string",
    • "sourceMetadataPath": "string",
    • "processedMetadataPath": "string",
    • "dataResourceId": 0,
    • "mapLayerId": 0,
    • "bandCount": 0,
    • "bounds3857": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "bounds4326": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "imageCoordinates": [
      • [
        • 0,
        • 0
        ]
      ],
    • "defaultRules": { },
    • "sourceFileSize": 0,
    • "processedFileSize": 0,
    • "progressLog": "string",
    • "errorMessage": "string",
    • "importedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "processedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "metadata": {
      • "size": [
        • 0
        ],
      • "driver": "string",
      • "coordinateSystem": "string",
      • "bands": [
        • {
          • "band": 0,
          • "type": "string",
          • "description": "string",
          • "colorInterpretation": "string",
          • "min": 0,
          • "max": 0,
          • "isInteger": true
          }
        ]
      }
    }
}

获取数据资源可视化聚合摘要

返回右侧数据洞察面板所需的轻量聚合统计，包括分类字段 TopN、数值字段分布、空间覆盖摘要、数据质量问题和监测功能占位信息。 矢量数据基于当前资源的 GeoPackage 图层聚合；栅格数据基于已登记的栅格元数据生成摘要。接口不返回原始 GeoJSON、栅格像元数组或查询结果数据本体。 需要 core.browse_data，并沿用数据资源访问范围校验；无权访问资源返回 403，资源不存在或未启用返回 404。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
id
required
integer

资源 ID

query Parameters
topN
integer [ 3 .. 20 ]
Default: 8

每个分类字段返回的最高频类别数量。

histogramBins
integer [ 4 .. 20 ]
Default: 8

数值字段直方图分箱数量。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/resources/{id}/visualization-summary/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/resources/{id}/visualization-summary/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resource": {
    • "id": 7,
    • "name": "塔里木河胡杨样地监测点",
    • "code": "tarim-populus-plots",
    • "dataType": "vector",
    • "domainType": "population",
    • "category": {
      • "id": 101,
      • "type": "data_category",
      • "code": "monitoring",
      • "name": "长期监测"
      },
    • "source": "2026 塔里木河野外调查",
    • "provider": "生态监测组",
    • "dataDate": "2026-06-01",
    • "spatialExtent": "80.100000,40.100000,82.800000,41.900000",
    • "coordinateSystem": "EPSG:4326",
    • "fileFormat": "GPKG",
    • "description": "由 Excel/CSV 导入的地理样地监测点数据。",
    • "qualityNote": "坐标有效率 126/128。",
    • "status": "active",
    • "isQueryable": true,
    • "isRenderable": false,
    • "updatedAt": "2026-07-03T09:30:00Z",
    • "sizeBytes": 245760,
    • "itemCount": 128
    },
  • "domainType": "population",
  • "generatedAt": "2026-07-07T09:30:00Z",
  • "source": "backend_aggregate",
  • "profile": {
    • "featureCount": 128,
    • "fieldCount": 16,
    • "geometryType": "Point",
    • "bounds": [
      • 80.1,
      • 40.1,
      • 82.8,
      • 41.9
      ]
    },
  • "categoryStats": [
    • {
      • "field": "栖息地类型",
      • "label": "栖息地类型",
      • "total": 128,
      • "nullCount": 0,
      • "uniqueCount": 4,
      • "truncated": false,
      • "items": [
        • {
          • "label": "林地",
          • "count": 58,
          • "ratio": 0.4531
          },
        • {
          • "label": "河沟",
          • "count": 31,
          • "ratio": 0.2422
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "numericStats": [
    • {
      • "field": "重要值",
      • "label": "重要值",
      • "count": 128,
      • "nullCount": 0,
      • "min": 0.81,
      • "max": 42.6,
      • "mean": 11.24,
      • "median": 8.73,
      • "q1": 4.12,
      • "q3": 16.4,
      • "histogram": [
        • {
          • "min": 0.81,
          • "max": 6.03,
          • "count": 32,
          • "label": "0.81-6.03"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "spatialSummary": {
    • "featureCount": 128,
    • "validGeometryCount": 126,
    • "nullGeometryCount": 2,
    • "coordinateCoverageRatio": 0.9844,
    • "bounds": [
      • 80.1,
      • 40.1,
      • 82.8,
      • 41.9
      ],
    • "geometryTypes": [
      • {
        • "label": "Point",
        • "count": 126,
        • "ratio": 0.9844
        }
      ],
    • "centroid": [
      • 81.42,
      • 40.92
      ]
    },
  • "qualityIssues": [
    • {
      • "code": "null_geometry",
      • "severity": "warning",
      • "title": "空几何记录",
      • "message": "存在 2 条记录没有可用空间几何。",
      • "count": 2,
      • "ratio": 0.0156
      }
    ],
  • "recommendedCharts": [
    • {
      • "chartType": "rank_bar",
      • "title": "重要值 Top 排名",
      • "description": "展示当前种群数据中优势物种或样方的重要值排序。",
      • "fields": [
        • "重要值"
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "recommendedSymbolizations": [
    • {
      • "templateId": "population.importance.graduated.v1",
      • "name": "种群重要值分级",
      • "description": "按重要值将种群样点划分为 5 个等级，突出优势度差异。",
      • "businessType": "population",
      • "rendererType": "graduated",
      • "primaryField": "重要值",
      • "matchedFields": [
        • "重要值"
        ],
      • "matchStatus": "matched",
      • "isPrimary": true,
      • "priority": 10,
      • "warnings": [ ],
      • "symbolization": {
        • "opacity": 90,
        • "pointMode": "symbol",
        • "renderer": {
          • "type": "graduated",
          • "field": "重要值",
          • "method": "quantile",
          • "classCount": 5,
          • "precision": 2,
          • "colorRamp": "green",
          • "templateId": "population.importance.graduated.v1",
          • "businessType": "population",
          • "updatedByUser": false,
          • "classes": [
            • {
              • "id": "range-1",
              • "label": "低重要值",
              • "min": 0.81,
              • "max": 6.03,
              • "color": "#E4F6D6",
              • "iconImage": "gm-populus",
              • "size": 0.88,
              • "count": 32,
              • "visible": true
              }
            ],
          • "defaultClass": {
            • "id": "no-data",
            • "label": "无数值/空值",
            • "min": null,
            • "max": null,
            • "color": "#8A8F98",
            • "iconImage": "gm-populus",
            • "size": 0.9,
            • "count": 0,
            • "visible": true
            }
          },
        • "symbol": {
          • "iconImage": "gm-populus",
          • "iconSize": 1,
          • "textField": ""
          },
        • "circle": {
          • "circleColor": "#2F7D62",
          • "circleRadius": 7
          }
        }
      }
    ],
  • "monitorPreview": {
    • "title": "监测能力预留",
    • "status": "planned",
    • "items": [
      • {
        • "label": "阈值配置",
        • "status": "planned",
        • "description": "后续支持为字段配置预警阈值。"
        }
      ]
    }
}

查询矢量数据

对矢量数据资源执行属性 + 空间联合查询，返回 GeoJSON FeatureCollection 以及空间查询工作台展示所需的命中数量、返回范围、截断状态和查询耗时。需要当前用户同时具备 core.query_data 和 core.load_vector_layer，并且有权访问该数据资源。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
id
required
integer

资源 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
Array of objects (AttributeFilter)

属性过滤条件

required
SpatialFilter (object) or null

空间过滤条件；不启用空间过滤时为 null

limit
required
integer
Default: 30000

返回结果上限

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/resources/{id}/query/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/resources/{id}/query/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "attributeFilters": [
    • {
      • "field": "string",
      • "operator": "contains",
      • "value": "string",
      • "valueTo": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "spatialFilter": {
    • "mode": "rectangle",
    • "geometry": {
      • "type": "Point",
      • "coordinates": null
      }
    },
  • "limit": 30000
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resourceId": 0,
  • "resourceName": "string",
  • "totalCount": 0,
  • "returnedCount": 0,
  • "limit": 0,
  • "limitExceeded": true,
  • "bounds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "elapsedMs": 0,
  • "fields": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "nullable": true,
      • "sampleValues": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "description": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "geojson": {
    • "type": "FeatureCollection",
    • "features": [
      • {
        • "id": "string",
        • "type": "Feature",
        • "geometry": {
          • "type": "Point",
          • "coordinates": null
          },
        • "properties": { }
        }
      ]
    },
  • "warnings": [
    • {
      • "code": "string",
      • "count": 0,
      • "message": "string",
      • "minMeters": 0,
      • "maxMeters": 0,
      • "ratio": 0
      }
    ]
}

同步导出图层

将指定图层数据导出为 ZIP 文件；矢量图层可选择 GeoJSON 或 Shapefile，栅格图层导出为 GeoTIFF。导出请求不受 Django DATA_UPLOAD_MAX_MEMORY_SIZE 上传内存限制影响。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
epsg
integer or null
Default: 4326

目标 EPSG，reproject 为 true 时使用

reproject
required
boolean
Default: true

是否重投影导出

clip
required
boolean
Default: false

是否按空间范围裁切

GeoJSONGeometry (object) or null

裁切 GeoJSON 几何

format
string
Default: "geojson"
Enum: "geojson" "shapefile"

矢量图层导出格式；选择 shapefile 时后端将 Shapefile 组件文件写入目录后压缩为 ZIP

required
Array of objects (ExportItem)

待导出图层

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/export/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/export/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "epsg": 4326,
  • "reproject": true,
  • "clip": false,
  • "clipGeometry": {
    • "type": "Point",
    • "coordinates": null
    },
  • "format": "geojson",
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "layerType": "vector",
      • "name": "string",
      • "resourceId": 0,
      • "geojson": {
        • "type": "FeatureCollection",
        • "features": [
          • {
            • "id": "string",
            • "type": "Feature",
            • "geometry": {
              • "type": "Point",
              • "coordinates": null
              },
            • "properties": { }
            }
          ]
        },
      • "datasetId": 0,
      • "sourceCrs": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "请求参数错误"
}

异步导出图层

与同步导出参数相同，但以异步任务方式执行

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
epsg
integer or null
Default: 4326

目标 EPSG，reproject 为 true 时使用

reproject
required
boolean
Default: true

是否重投影导出

clip
required
boolean
Default: false

是否按空间范围裁切

GeoJSONGeometry (object) or null

裁切 GeoJSON 几何

format
string
Default: "geojson"
Enum: "geojson" "shapefile"

矢量图层导出格式；选择 shapefile 时后端将 Shapefile 组件文件写入目录后压缩为 ZIP

required
Array of objects (ExportItem)

待导出图层

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/export/async/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/export/async/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "epsg": 4326,
  • "reproject": true,
  • "clip": false,
  • "clipGeometry": {
    • "type": "Point",
    • "coordinates": null
    },
  • "format": "geojson",
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "layerType": "vector",
      • "name": "string",
      • "resourceId": 0,
      • "geojson": {
        • "type": "FeatureCollection",
        • "features": [
          • {
            • "id": "string",
            • "type": "Feature",
            • "geometry": {
              • "type": "Point",
              • "coordinates": null
              },
            • "properties": { }
            }
          ]
        },
      • "datasetId": 0,
      • "sourceCrs": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "kind": "import",
  • "status": "queued",
  • "progressPercent": 100,
  • "messages": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "result": {
    • "delivery": "xyz",
    • "datasetId": 0,
    • "layerId": 0,
    • "styleHash": "string",
    • "tileUrl": "string",
    • "status": "ready",
    • "bounds3857": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "bounds4326": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "imageCoordinates": [
      • [
        • 0,
        • 0
        ]
      ],
    • "rules": { }
    },
  • "error": "string",
  • "startedAt": 0.1,
  • "finishedAt": 0
}

下载导出文件

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
job_id
required
string

异步任务 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/catalog/export/jobs/{job_id}/download/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/catalog/export/jobs/{job_id}/download/

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "请先登录"
}

图层

地图图层接口

获取图层列表

返回当前用户可见且可浏览的启用地图图层；若图层关联的数据资源对当前用户不可见，该图层也不会返回，避免用户看到无法加载的数据。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/layers/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/layers/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "layerType": "vector",
      • "geometryType": "point",
      • "category": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "type": "string",
        • "code": "string",
        • "name": "string"
        },
      • "dataResourceId": 0,
      • "sortOrder": 0,
      • "defaultVisible": true,
      • "defaultOpacity": 100,
      • "symbolization": {
        • "opacity": 100,
        • "pointMode": "circle",
        • "renderer": {
          • "type": "single",
          • "templateId": "string",
          • "businessType": "string",
          • "updatedByUser": true
          },
        • "circle": { },
        • "symbol": { },
        • "heatmap": { },
        • "cluster": { },
        • "line": { },
        • "fill": { }
        },
      • "bounds": [
        • 0
        ],
      • "legend": "string",
      • "rasterRules": { },
      • "isActive": true,
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

搜索

全局搜索接口

全局搜索

搜索数据资源。q 为空时返回空结果。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
q
string
Default: ""

搜索关键词，为空时返回空结果

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/search/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/search/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resources": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "dataType": "vector",
      • "domainType": "germplasm",
      • "category": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "type": "string",
        • "code": "string",
        • "name": "string"
        },
      • "source": "string",
      • "provider": "string",
      • "dataDate": "2019-08-24",
      • "spatialExtent": "string",
      • "coordinateSystem": "string",
      • "fileFormat": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "qualityNote": "string",
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "itemCount": 0,
      • "status": "active",
      • "isQueryable": true,
      • "isRenderable": true,
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

栅格数据

栅格数据管理接口

获取栅格数据集列表

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/raster/datasets/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/raster/datasets/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "status": "pending",
      • "sourcePath": "string",
      • "processedPath": "string",
      • "sourceMetadataPath": "string",
      • "processedMetadataPath": "string",
      • "dataResourceId": 0,
      • "mapLayerId": 0,
      • "bandCount": 0,
      • "bounds3857": [
        • 0
        ],
      • "bounds4326": [
        • 0
        ],
      • "imageCoordinates": [
        • [
          • 0,
          • 0
          ]
        ],
      • "defaultRules": { },
      • "sourceFileSize": 0,
      • "processedFileSize": 0,
      • "progressLog": "string",
      • "errorMessage": "string",
      • "importedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "processedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "metadata": {
        • "size": [
          • 0
          ],
        • "driver": "string",
        • "coordinateSystem": "string",
        • "bands": [
          • {
            • "band": 0,
            • "type": "string",
            • "description": "string",
            • "colorInterpretation": "string",
            • "min": 0,
            • "max": 0,
            • "isInteger": true
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
}

导入栅格文件

导入或上传栅格源文件。上传文件会先按系统配置的 application.limits.upload_max_mb 校验文件大小，并读取栅格元信息校验单边像素长度不超过 application.limits.max_raster_side_pixels；校验失败返回 400 ErrorResponse，不会提交异步任务。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema:
required
sourcePath
required
string

源文件相对路径（相对于科研数据根目录）

name
string

前端显示的数据集名称；为空时默认取源文件名，不包含后端后台唯一存储文件名

async
boolean
Default: true

是否异步执行

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/raster/import/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/raster/import/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
{
  • "sourcePath": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "async": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 202
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "code": "string",
  • "status": "pending",
  • "sourcePath": "string",
  • "processedPath": "string",
  • "sourceMetadataPath": "string",
  • "processedMetadataPath": "string",
  • "dataResourceId": 0,
  • "mapLayerId": 0,
  • "bandCount": 0,
  • "bounds3857": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "bounds4326": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "imageCoordinates": [
    • [
      • 0,
      • 0
      ]
    ],
  • "defaultRules": { },
  • "sourceFileSize": 0,
  • "processedFileSize": 0,
  • "progressLog": "string",
  • "errorMessage": "string",
  • "importedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "processedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "metadata": {
    • "size": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "driver": "string",
    • "coordinateSystem": "string",
    • "bands": [
      • {
        • "band": 0,
        • "type": "string",
        • "description": "string",
        • "colorInterpretation": "string",
        • "min": 0,
        • "max": 0,
        • "isInteger": true
        }
      ]
    }
}

扫描栅格源目录

扫描研究数据目录中的未处理栅格文件，自动创建数据集

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/raster/scan/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/raster/scan/

Response samples

  • 202
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "kind": "import",
  • "status": "queued",
  • "progressPercent": 100,
  • "messages": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "result": {
    • "delivery": "xyz",
    • "datasetId": 0,
    • "layerId": 0,
    • "styleHash": "string",
    • "tileUrl": "string",
    • "status": "ready",
    • "bounds3857": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "bounds4326": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "imageCoordinates": [
      • [
        • 0,
        • 0
        ]
      ],
    • "rules": { }
    },
  • "error": "string",
  • "startedAt": 0.1,
  • "finishedAt": 0
}

注册栅格渲染样式（同步）

为栅格图层注册瓦片样式并返回 XYZ 瓦片 URL

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
layerId
required
integer

栅格图层 ID

rulesMode
string
Default: "default"
Enum: "default" "custom"

符号化规则模式

RasterSymbolizationRules (object) or null

自定义符号化规则

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/raster/render/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/raster/render/

application/json

  • "rulesMode": "default",
  • "rules": { }
}

  • 400

  • 403
  • 404

    • 0

    • 0
    ],

rulesMode
string

    ],

获取栅格唯一值分类

获取指定栅格数据集某一波段的唯一值列表，用于唯一值符号化

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
datasetId
required
integer

栅格数据集 ID

band
integer
Default: 1

1-based 波段编号

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/raster/unique-values/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/raster/unique-values/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "datasetId": 0,
  • "band": 1
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "band": 0,
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "value": 0,
      • "color": "string",
      • "label": "string"
      }
    ]
}

获取 XYZ 瓦片

获取渲染后的栅格 PNG 瓦片，供 Mapbox GL JS 消费

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
dataset_id
required
integer

栅格数据集 ID

style_hash
required
string

样式哈希

z
required
integer

缩放级别

x
required
integer

瓦片列号

y
required
integer

瓦片行号

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/raster/tiles/{dataset_id}/{style_hash}/{z}/{x}/{y}.png

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/raster/tiles/{dataset_id}/{style_hash}/{z}/{x}/{y}.png

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "请先登录"
}

异步任务

异步任务状态查询接口

查询异步任务状态

所有异步操作（栅格导入、扫描、渲染、导出）均返回统一的任务对象

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
job_id
required
string

异步任务 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/raster/jobs/{job_id}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/raster/jobs/{job_id}/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "kind": "import",
  • "status": "queued",
  • "progressPercent": 100,
  • "messages": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "result": {
    • "delivery": "xyz",
    • "datasetId": 0,
    • "layerId": 0,
    • "styleHash": "string",
    • "tileUrl": "string",
    • "status": "ready",
    • "bounds3857": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "bounds4326": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "imageCoordinates": [
      • [
        • 0,
        • 0
        ]
      ],
    • "rules": { }
    },
  • "error": "string",
  • "startedAt": 0.1,
  • "finishedAt": 0
}

管理后台

Ant Design Pro 管理后台用户、用户组、权限偏好和用户可配置设置接口

获取当前用户后台资料

返回当前登录用户的个人资料、已授予权限、主动关闭权限和有效权限。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/profile/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/profile/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "user": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "avatarUrl": "string",
    • "department": "string",
    • "isStaff": true,
    • "isSuperuser": true,
    • "roles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "permissions": {
      • "canAccessAdmin": true,
      • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
      • "canCreateUser": true,
      • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
      • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
      • "canManageDataBackup": true,
      • "canManageAuth": true,
      • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
      • "canViewDataOverview": true,
      • "canBrowseData": true,
      • "canQueryData": true,
      • "canUploadData": true,
      • "canViewDataResources": true,
      • "canCreateDataResources": true,
      • "canChangeDataResources": true,
      • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
      • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
      • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
      • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
      • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
      • "canExportData": true,
      • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
      • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
      • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
      • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
      • "canManageRasterData": true
      },
    • "groupIds": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "isActive": true,
    • "groupPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "directPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "disabledPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "effectivePermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "operationLogGroupIds": [
      • 0
      ]
    },
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "grantedPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "availablePermissions": [
    • {
      • "id": "core.view_operation_logs",
      • "label": "查看操作日志",
      • "group": "后台权限"
      }
    ]
}

更新当前用户后台资料

更新当前用户的用户名、展示名称、邮箱、头像和部门。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
username
string

新用户名

displayName
string

新展示名称

email
string <email>

新邮箱

avatarUrl
string

新头像 URL

department
string

新部门

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/profile/update/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/profile/update/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "username": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "user": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "avatarUrl": "string",
    • "department": "string",
    • "isStaff": true,
    • "isSuperuser": true,
    • "roles": [
      • "string"
      ],

      • "canAccessAdmin": true,
      • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
      • "canCreateUser": true,

      • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
      • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
      • "canManageDataBackup": true,
      • "canManageAuth": true,
      • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
      • "canViewDataOverview": true,
      • "canBrowseData": true,
      • "canQueryData": true,
      • "canUploadData": true,
      • "canViewDataResources": true,
      • "canCreateDataResources": true,
      • "canChangeDataResources": true,
      • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
      • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
      • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
      • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
      • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
      • "canExportData": true,
      • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
      • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
      • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
      • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
      • "canManageRasterData": true
      },
    • "groupIds": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "isActive": true,
    • "groupPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "directPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "disabledPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "effectivePermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "operationLogGroupIds": [
      • 0
      ]
    },
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "grantedPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "availablePermissions": [
    • {
      • "id": "core.view_operation_logs",
      • "label": "查看操作日志",
      • "group": "后台权限"
      }
    ]
}

更新当前用户主动关闭的权限

用户只能关闭或重新开启已经由上级授予的功能权限，不能写入未授予权限。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
disabledPermissions
required
Array of strings

用户主动关闭的权限列表，必须全部属于 grantedPermissions

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/profile/permissions/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/profile/permissions/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "user": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "avatarUrl": "string",
    • "department": "string",
    • "isStaff": true,
    • "isSuperuser": true,
    • "roles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "permissions": {
      • "canAccessAdmin": true,
      • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
      • "canCreateUser": true,
      • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
      • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
      • "canManageDataBackup": true,
      • "canManageAuth": true,
      • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
      • "canViewDataOverview": true,
      • "canBrowseData": true,
      • "canQueryData": true,
      • "canUploadData": true,
      • "canViewDataResources": true,
      • "canCreateDataResources": true,
      • "canChangeDataResources": true,
      • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
      • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
      • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
      • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
      • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
      • "canExportData": true,
      • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
      • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
      • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
      • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
      • "canManageRasterData": true
      },
    • "groupIds": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "isActive": true,
    • "groupPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "directPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "disabledPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "effectivePermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "operationLogGroupIds": [
      • 0
      ]
    },
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "grantedPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "availablePermissions": [
    • {
      • "id": "core.view_operation_logs",
      • "label": "查看操作日志",
      • "group": "后台权限"
      }
    ]
}

修改当前用户密码

校验当前密码、新密码至少 6 位和确认密码后更新密码，并记录操作日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
currentPassword
required
string <password>

当前登录密码

newPassword
required
string <password>

新密码，至少 6 位

passwordConfirm
required
string <password>

新密码确认值，必须与 newPassword 一致

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/profile/password/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/profile/password/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "currentPassword": "pa$$word",
  • "newPassword": "pa$$word",
  • "passwordConfirm": "pa$$word"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "string"
}

上传当前用户头像

上传当前用户头像文件。仅支持 JPG 和 PNG，后端会压缩为不超过 300x300 的 JPEG 并清空外部头像 URL。需要登录态并写入操作日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
avatar
required
string <binary>

JPG 或 PNG 头像文件，最大 2MB

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/profile/avatar/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/profile/avatar/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "user": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "avatarUrl": "string",
    • "department": "string",
    • "isStaff": true,
    • "isSuperuser": true,
    • "roles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "permissions": {
      • "canAccessAdmin": true,
      • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
      • "canCreateUser": true,
      • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
      • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
      • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
      • "canManageDataBackup": true,
      • "canManageAuth": true,
      • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
      • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
      • "canViewDataOverview": true,
      • "canBrowseData": true,
      • "canQueryData": true,
      • "canUploadData": true,
      • "canViewDataResources": true,
      • "canCreateDataResources": true,
      • "canChangeDataResources": true,
      • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
      • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
      • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
      • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
      • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
      • "canExportData": true,
      • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
      • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
      • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
      • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
      • "canManageRasterData": true
      },
    • "groupIds": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "isActive": true,
    • "groupPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "directPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "disabledPermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "effectivePermissions": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "operationLogGroupIds": [
      • 0
      ]
    },
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "grantedPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "availablePermissions": [
    • {
      • "id": "core.view_operation_logs",
      • "label": "查看操作日志",
      • "group": "后台权限"
      }
    ]
}

查询操作日志

基于真实操作日志表返回可分页、可筛选的后台操作日志。登录用户始终可查看自己的操作日志；更大范围由 core.view_all_operation_logs、core.view_group_operation_logs 和当前用户配置的 operationLogGroupIds 共同裁剪。非超级管理员主体无法看到超级管理员用户产生的日志。可通过 userId 精确筛选授权范围内的指定用户日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
current
integer >= 1
Default: 1

当前页码

pageSize
integer >= 1
Default: 20

每页数量

operator
string

在授权日志范围内按操作用户名或显示名称模糊筛选

userId
integer

在授权日志范围内按操作用户 ID 精确筛选

module
string

按模块名称模糊筛选

action
string

按操作动作模糊筛选

result
string
Enum: "success" "warning" "failed"

按操作结果筛选

targetType
string
Enum: "data_resource" "workspace_scene"

按结构化操作目标类型筛选

targetId
integer

按结构化操作目标后台 ID 精确筛选

keyword
string

跨用户、模块、动作、操作目标和摘要的关键词筛选

startTime
string

操作时间起点，支持日期或日期时间字符串

endTime
string

操作时间终点，支持日期或日期时间字符串

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/operation-logs/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/operation-logs/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "occurredAt": "2026-06-05 09:31:42",
      • "operator": "string",
      • "module": "string",
      • "action": "string",
      • "result": "success",
      • "targetType": "string",
      • "targetId": 0,
      • "targetCode": "string",
      • "targetName": "string",
      • "ipAddress": "string",
      • "summary": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0
}

查询系统日志

返回业务数据根目录 logs/ 下的后台运行日志文件列表，并读取指定日志文件的尾部内容。需要 core.view_system_logs 权限；接口只接受文件名选择，不暴露服务器绝对路径，也不允许访问日志目录之外的文件。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
file
string

要读取的日志文件名；为空时默认读取最近修改的日志文件

lines
integer [ 1 .. 2000 ]
Default: 500

返回的尾部日志行数，后端最大限制为 2000 行

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/system-logs/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/system-logs/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "files": [
    • {
      • "name": "application.log",
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "modifiedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "selectedFile": "string",
  • "lines": 0,
  • "content": "string",
  • "generatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

获取后台概览统计

返回后台概览首屏统计数据与指定周期活跃用户。登录用户均可进入后台概览；各展示卡片按 core.view_dashboard_*_card 权限独立返回，未授权卡片不会出现在响应中。活跃用户定义为周期内存在成功登录操作日志的去重用户。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
period
string
Default: "day"
Enum: "day" "week" "month"

活跃用户统计周期，day 为今日按小时统计，week 为本周按日统计，month 为本月按日统计。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/dashboard/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/dashboard/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "generatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "cards": {
    • "resources": {
      • "total": 0,
      • "active": 0
      },
    • "layers": {
      • "total": 0,
      • "active": 0
      },
    • "rasters": {
      • "resources": 0,
      • "datasets": 0,
      • "layers": 0
      },
    • "dataOverview": {
      • "totalResources": 0,
      • "activeResources": 0,
      • "totalSizeBytes": 0,
      • "totalItemCount": 0,
      • "typeBreakdown": [
        • {
          • "dataType": "vector",
          • "count": 0,
          • "sizeBytes": 0,
          • "itemCount": 0
          }
        ],
      • "ownUploads": {
        • "totalResources": 0,
        • "activeResources": 0,
        • "totalSizeBytes": 0,
        • "totalItemCount": 0,
        • "typeBreakdown": [
          • {
            • "dataType": "vector",
            • "count": 0,
            • "sizeBytes": 0,
            • "itemCount": 0
            }
          ],
        • "spatialSummary": {
          • "spatialResourceCount": 0,
          • "missingSpatialResourceCount": 0,
          • "totalBounds": [
            • 0
            ],
          • "resourceExtents": [
            • {
              • "resourceId": 0,
              • "name": "string",
              • "dataType": "vector",
              • "bounds": [
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "center": [
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "coverageAreaKm2": 0,
              • "sizeBytes": 0,
              • "itemCount": 0,
              • "coordinateSystem": "string",
              • "uploaderName": "string",
              • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
              }
            ],
          • "resourceExtentsTruncated": true,
          • "coverageRanking": [
            • {
              • "resourceId": 0,
              • "name": "string",
              • "dataType": "vector",
              • "bounds": [
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "center": [
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "coverageAreaKm2": 0,
              • "sizeBytes": 0,
              • "itemCount": 0,
              • "coordinateSystem": "string",
              • "uploaderName": "string",
              • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
              }
            ],
          • "heatmapCells": [
            • {
              • "column": 0,
              • "row": 0,
              • "bounds": [
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "resourceCount": 0,
              • "itemCount": 0
              }
            ]
          }
        },
      • "visibleResources": {
        • "totalResources": 0,
        • "activeResources": 0,
        • "totalSizeBytes": 0,
        • "totalItemCount": 0,

          • {

            • "count": 0,
            • "sizeBytes": 0,
            • "itemCount": 0
            }
          ],
