          • "spatialResourceCount": 0,
          • "missingSpatialResourceCount": 0,
          • "totalBounds": [
            • 0
            ],
          • "resourceExtents": [
            • {
              • "resourceId": 0,
              • "name": "string",
              • "dataType": "vector",
              • "bounds": [
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "center": [
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "coverageAreaKm2": 0,
              • "sizeBytes": 0,
              • "itemCount": 0,
              • "coordinateSystem": "string",
              • "uploaderName": "string",
              • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
              }
            ],
          • "resourceExtentsTruncated": true,
          • "coverageRanking": [
            • {
              • "resourceId": 0,
              • "name": "string",
              • "dataType": "vector",
              • "bounds": [
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "center": [
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "coverageAreaKm2": 0,
              • "sizeBytes": 0,
              • "itemCount": 0,
              • "coordinateSystem": "string",
              • "uploaderName": "string",
              • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
              }
            ],
          • "heatmapCells": [
            • {
              • "column": 0,
              • "row": 0,
              • "bounds": [
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0,
                • 0
                ],
              • "resourceCount": 0,
              • "itemCount": 0
              }
            ]
          }
        },
      • "uploaders": [
        • {
          • "user": {
            • "id": 0,
            • "username": "string",
            • "displayName": "string"
            },
          • "resourceCount": 0,
          • "sizeBytes": 0,
          • "itemCount": 0
          }
        ]
      },
    • "users": {
      • "total": 0,
      • "active": 0,
      • "disabled": 0,
      • "groups": 0,
      • "vectorResources": 0,
      • "tableResources": 0
      },
    • "activeUsers": {
      • "period": "day",
      • "rangeStart": "2019-08-24",
      • "rangeEnd": "2019-08-24",
      • "count": 0,
      • "loginCount": 0,
      • "series": [
        • {
          • "key": "string",
          • "label": "string",
          • "count": 0
          }
        ],
      • "ranking": [
        • {
          • "userId": 0,
          • "displayName": "string",
          • "username": "string",
          • "loginCount": 0
          }
        ]
      }
    }
}

获取后台概览服务器监控

返回服务器 CPU、内存、硬盘型号、数量和使用情况等监控快照。需要 core.view_dashboard_system_card；没有系统信息权限时前端不展示服务器信息区域，前端每 5 秒刷新一次。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/dashboard/server/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/dashboard/server/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "generatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "hostname": "string",
  • "platform": "string",
  • "cards": {
    • "cpu": {
      • "model": "string",
      • "physicalCount": 0,
      • "logicalCount": 0,
      • "usagePercent": 0.1,
      • "loadAverage": [
        • 0.1,
        • 0.1,
        • 0.1
        ]
      },
    • "memory": {
      • "model": "string",
      • "slotCount": 0,
      • "totalBytes": 0,
      • "usedBytes": 0,
      • "availableBytes": 0,
      • "usagePercent": 0.1
      },
    • "disks": {
      • "count": 0,
      • "devices": [
        • {
          • "name": "string",
          • "model": "string",
          • "size": "string"
          }
        ],
      • "mount": "string",
      • "totalBytes": 0,
      • "usedBytes": 0,
      • "freeBytes": 0,
      • "usagePercent": 0.1
      }
    }
}

获取用户可配置设置

返回后台允许展示和修改的 application 配置，不返回 runtime 内部变量。需要 core.manage_system_settings。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/settings/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/settings/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "systemName": "string",
  • "allowRegistration": true,
  • "map": {
    • "defaultCenter": [
      • 87.6,
      • 41.7
      ],
    • "defaultZoom": 6.5,
    • "defaultBasemap": "mapbox://styles/mapbox/satellite-streets-v12",
    • "mapboxAccessToken": "string"
    },
  • "limits": {
    • "uploadMaxMb": 500,
    • "queryResultLimit": 30000,
    • "maxRasterSidePixels": 10000
    },
  • "raster": {
    • "symbolizerTimeoutSeconds": 0
    },
  • "editable": true
}

更新用户可配置设置

将后台设置直接写入 appdata 下的运行 TOML 配置副本。需要 core.manage_system_settings。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
systemName
string

更新后的系统显示名称

allowRegistration
boolean

是否开放自助注册

object (MapConfig)
object (SystemLimits)
object (AdminRasterSettings)

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/settings/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/settings/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "systemName": "string",
  • "allowRegistration": true,
  • "map": {
    • "defaultCenter": [
      • 87.6,
      • 41.7
      ],
    • "defaultZoom": 6.5,
    • "defaultBasemap": "mapbox://styles/mapbox/satellite-streets-v12",
    • "mapboxAccessToken": "string"
    },
  • "limits": {
    • "uploadMaxMb": 500,
    • "queryResultLimit": 30000,
    • "maxRasterSidePixels": 10000
    },
  • "raster": {
    • "symbolizerTimeoutSeconds": 0
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "systemName": "string",
  • "allowRegistration": true,
  • "map": {
    • "defaultCenter": [
      • 87.6,
      • 41.7
      ],
    • "defaultZoom": 6.5,
    • "defaultBasemap": "mapbox://styles/mapbox/satellite-streets-v12",
    • "mapboxAccessToken": "string"
    },
  • "limits": {
    • "uploadMaxMb": 500,
    • "queryResultLimit": 30000,
    • "maxRasterSidePixels": 10000
    },
  • "raster": {
    • "symbolizerTimeoutSeconds": 0
    },
  • "editable": true
}

获取数据备份概览

返回超级管理员数据备份页面所需的计划配置、数据范围摘要、运行中任务和最近历史。该接口仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问；即使普通用户被误授予 core.manage_data_backup 权限，后端也会拒绝访问。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/overview/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/overview/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "settings": {
    • "plans": {
      • "platform": {
        • "enabled": true,
        • "dailyAt": "02:00",
        • "target": "local",
        • "retentionCount": 1,
        • "includeLogs": true
        },
      • "research": {
        • "enabled": true,
        • "dailyAt": "02:00",
        • "target": "local",
        • "retentionCount": 1,
        • "includeLogs": true
        }
      },
    • "local": {
      • "directory": "string",
      • "configured": true
      },
    • "objectStorage": {
      • "provider": "s3_compatible",
      • "endpoint": "string",
      • "region": "string",
      • "bucket": "string",
      • "prefix": "string",
      • "accessKeyId": "string",
      • "secretConfigured": true,
      • "secretPreview": "string",
      • "configured": true
      },
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "summaries": [
    • {
      • "planType": "platform",
      • "label": "string",
      • "source": "string",
      • "available": true,
      • "fileCount": 0,
      • "sizeBytes": 0
      }
    ],
  • "activeRuns": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "planType": "platform",
      • "targetType": "local",
      • "trigger": "manual",
      • "status": "queued",
      • "progressPercent": 100,
      • "messages": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "result": { },
      • "error": "string",
      • "archiveName": "string",
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "checksumSha256": "string",
      • "objectKey": "string",
      • "localPath": "string",
      • "createdBy": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "startedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "finishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "recentRuns": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "planType": "platform",
      • "targetType": "local",
      • "trigger": "manual",
      • "status": "queued",
      • "progressPercent": 100,
      • "messages": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "result": { },
      • "error": "string",
      • "archiveName": "string",
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "checksumSha256": "string",
      • "objectKey": "string",
      • "localPath": "string",
      • "createdBy": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "startedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "finishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "generatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

获取数据备份配置

返回本地备份目标、云端对象存储目标和平台/科研数据备份计划。仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问；云端密钥永不回显，仅返回是否已配置和脱敏预览。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/settings/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/settings/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "plans": {
    • "platform": {
      • "enabled": true,
      • "dailyAt": "02:00",
      • "target": "local",
      • "retentionCount": 1,
      • "includeLogs": true
      },
    • "research": {
      • "enabled": true,
      • "dailyAt": "02:00",
      • "target": "local",
      • "retentionCount": 1,
      • "includeLogs": true
      }
    },
  • "local": {
    • "directory": "string",
    • "configured": true
    },
  • "objectStorage": {
    • "provider": "s3_compatible",
    • "endpoint": "string",
    • "region": "string",
    • "bucket": "string",
    • "prefix": "string",
    • "accessKeyId": "string",
    • "secretConfigured": true,
    • "secretPreview": "string",
    • "configured": true
    },
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

更新数据备份配置

将数据备份计划和目标配置写入运行 TOML 配置。仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问；secretAccessKey 只在提交时使用，读取配置时不会返回明文。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (AdminBackupPlans)
object
object (AdminBackupObjectStorageUpdate)

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/settings/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/settings/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "plans": {
    • "platform": {
      • "enabled": true,
      • "dailyAt": "02:00",
      • "target": "local",
      • "retentionCount": 1,
      • "includeLogs": true
      },
    • "research": {
      • "enabled": true,
      • "dailyAt": "02:00",
      • "target": "local",
      • "retentionCount": 1,
      • "includeLogs": true
      }
    },
  • "local": {
    • "directory": "string"
    },
  • "objectStorage": {
    • "provider": "s3_compatible",
    • "endpoint": "string",
    • "region": "string",
    • "bucket": "string",
    • "prefix": "string",
    • "accessKeyId": "string",
    • "secretAccessKey": "string",
    • "clearSecret": true
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "plans": {
    • "platform": {
      • "enabled": true,
      • "dailyAt": "02:00",
      • "target": "local",
      • "retentionCount": 1,
      • "includeLogs": true
      },
    • "research": {
      • "enabled": true,
      • "dailyAt": "02:00",
      • "target": "local",
      • "retentionCount": 1,
      • "includeLogs": true
      }
    },
  • "local": {
    • "directory": "string",
    • "configured": true
    },
  • "objectStorage": {
    • "provider": "s3_compatible",
    • "endpoint": "string",
    • "region": "string",
    • "bucket": "string",
    • "prefix": "string",
    • "accessKeyId": "string",
    • "secretConfigured": true,
    • "secretPreview": "string",
    • "configured": true
    },
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

测试备份目标连接

测试本地备份目录写入能力或对象存储上传/删除能力。仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问；对象存储测试可以使用请求体中的临时参数，也可以使用已保存配置。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
targetType
required
string (BackupTargetType)
Enum: "local" "object_storage"

备份目标类型；local 为本地目录，object_storage 为云端对象存储。

object
object (AdminBackupObjectStorageUpdate)

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/targets/test/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/targets/test/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "targetType": "local",
  • "local": {
    • "directory": "string"
    },
  • "objectStorage": {
    • "provider": "s3_compatible",
    • "endpoint": "string",
    • "region": "string",
    • "bucket": "string",
    • "prefix": "string",
    • "accessKeyId": "string",
    • "secretAccessKey": "string",
    • "clearSecret": true
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "targetType": "local",
  • "status": "success",
  • "message": "string",
  • "testedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

查询数据备份历史

分页返回手动和自动数据备份任务历史。仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
current
integer >= 1
Default: 1

当前页码

pageSize
integer >= 1
Default: 20

每页数量

planType
string (BackupPlanType)
Enum: "platform" "research"

按备份类型筛选

targetType
string (BackupTargetType)
Enum: "local" "object_storage"

按备份目标筛选

status
string (BackupRunStatus)
Enum: "queued" "running" "success" "failed"

按任务状态筛选

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/runs/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/runs/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "planType": "platform",
      • "targetType": "local",
      • "trigger": "manual",
      • "status": "queued",
      • "progressPercent": 100,
      • "messages": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "result": { },
      • "error": "string",
      • "archiveName": "string",
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "checksumSha256": "string",
      • "objectKey": "string",
      • "localPath": "string",
      • "createdBy": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "startedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "finishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0
}

发起数据备份任务

手动发起平台数据或科研数据备份任务。后端创建任务后异步生成归档并保存到本地或上传至对象存储；仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
planType
required
string (BackupPlanType)
Enum: "platform" "research"

备份内容类型；platform 表示平台业务数据，research 表示科研数据。

targetType
string (BackupTargetType)
Enum: "local" "object_storage"

备份目标类型；local 为本地目录，object_storage 为云端对象存储。

includeLogs
boolean

手动平台备份是否包含运行日志；未提供时使用计划配置。

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/runs/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/runs/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "planType": "platform",
  • "targetType": "local",
  • "includeLogs": true
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "planType": "platform",
  • "targetType": "local",
  • "trigger": "manual",
  • "status": "queued",
  • "progressPercent": 100,
  • "messages": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "result": { },
  • "error": "string",
  • "archiveName": "string",
  • "sizeBytes": 0,
  • "checksumSha256": "string",
  • "objectKey": "string",
  • "localPath": "string",
  • "createdBy": "string",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "startedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "finishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

获取数据备份任务详情

返回指定备份任务的当前状态、进度、消息、归档信息和错误原因。仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
runId
required
integer

备份任务 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/runs/{runId}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/runs/{runId}/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "planType": "platform",
  • "targetType": "local",
  • "trigger": "manual",
  • "status": "queued",
  • "progressPercent": 100,
  • "messages": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "result": { },
  • "error": "string",
  • "archiveName": "string",
  • "sizeBytes": 0,
  • "checksumSha256": "string",
  • "objectKey": "string",
  • "localPath": "string",
  • "createdBy": "string",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "startedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "finishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

下载本地数据备份归档

下载本地备份目标保存的归档文件。对象存储目标不会通过该接口代理下载，应使用历史记录中的对象路径在云端管理后台查看；仅允许平台内置“超级管理员”主体访问。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
runId
required
integer

备份任务 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/backups/runs/{runId}/download/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/backups/runs/{runId}/download/

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "请求参数错误"
}

获取存量数据管理列表

返回已导入或已登记的数据资源列表，支持启用和停用数据、多条件检索、访问用户组、存量数据内容分组和默认可视化方案查看。具备 catalog.view_dataresource、catalog.change_dataresource、catalog.delete_dataresource 或 catalog.export_dataresource 时，仅返回当前用户可见或本人上传且符合筛选条件的资源；超级管理员可查看全部资源；仅具备 catalog.add_dataresource 时只返回当前用户上传的数据资源，用于管理自己的数据可见范围。可手动配置的数据访问角色列表不会返回超级管理员角色，后端仍会强制保留超级管理员访问范围。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
q
string

按名称、编号、说明、来源或提供单位进行快速检索

dataType
string
Enum: "vector" "raster" "gene" "table" "document" "image"

数据类型筛选

status
string
Enum: "active" "inactive"

数据状态筛选

category
string

数据分类编码精确匹配

source
string

数据来源模糊匹配

provider
string

提供单位模糊匹配

dateFrom
string <date>

数据日期起始

dateTo
string <date>

数据日期截止

current
integer >= 1

当前页码

pageSize
integer >= 1

每页条数

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/data/resources/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/data/resources/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "code": "string",
      • "dataType": "vector",
      • "category": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "type": "string",
        • "code": "string",
        • "name": "string"
        },
      • "source": "string",
      • "provider": "string",
      • "dataDate": "2019-08-24",
      • "spatialExtent": "string",
      • "coordinateSystem": "string",
      • "fileFormat": "string",
      • "storagePath": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "qualityNote": "string",
      • "defaultVisualization": { },
      • "sizeBytes": 0,
      • "itemCount": 0,
      • "status": "active",
      • "inventoryGroupId": 0,
      • "accessGroups": [
        • {
          • "id": 0,
          • "name": "string",
          • "isGuest": true,
          • "isSuperadmin": true
          }
        ],
      • "canManageAccess": true,
      • "maintainer": "string",
      • "uploader": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "username": "string",
        • "displayName": "string"
        },
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "defaultLayer": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "name": "string",
        • "code": "string",
        • "layerType": "vector",
        • "geometryType": "point",
        • "defaultVisible": true,
        • "defaultOpacity": 100,
        • "symbolization": {
          • "opacity": 100,
          • "pointMode": "circle",
          • "renderer": {
            • "type": "single",
            • "templateId": "string",
            • "businessType": "string",
            • "updatedByUser": true
            },
          • "circle": { },
          • "symbol": { },
          • "heatmap": { },
          • "cluster": { },
          • "line": { },
          • "fill": { }
          },
        • "rasterRules": { },
        • "isActive": true
        }
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0,
  • "availableAccessGroups": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "isGuest": true,
      • "isSuperadmin": true
      }
    ],
  • "inventoryGroups": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

新建存量数据组别

新建用于存量数据管理嵌套表格展示的内容组别。该组别不影响数据访问权限；需要 catalog.change_dataresource，成功操作会写入审计日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
action
string
Enum: "update" "delete"

组别操作类型；新建接口忽略该字段，组别详情接口默认 update

name
string

新建或改名时写入的组别名称

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/data/resource-groups/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/data/resource-groups/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "action": "update",
  • "name": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

操作存量数据组别

更新或删除存量数据内容组别。删除组别时，后端会将组内数据的 inventoryGroupId 置为 null，使其回到默认分组，数据本身不会被删除。需要 catalog.change_dataresource，成功操作会写入审计日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
groupId
required
integer

存量数据组别 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
action
string
Enum: "update" "delete"

组别操作类型；新建接口忽略该字段，组别详情接口默认 update

name
string

新建或改名时写入的组别名称

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/data/resource-groups/{groupId}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/data/resource-groups/{groupId}/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "action": "update",
  • "name": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

导出存量数据清单

按当前筛选条件导出当前用户可见或本人上传的数据资源清单，支持 CSV 和 Excel；超级管理员可导出全部资源。需要 catalog.export_dataresource，操作会写入审计日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
format
string
Default: "csv"
Enum: "csv" "xlsx"

导出文件格式

q
string

按名称、编号、说明、来源或提供单位进行快速检索

dataType
string
Enum: "vector" "raster" "gene" "table" "document" "image"

数据类型筛选

status
string
Enum: "active" "inactive"

数据状态筛选

category
string

数据分类编码精确匹配

source
string

数据来源模糊匹配

provider
string

提供单位模糊匹配

dateFrom
string <date>

数据日期起始

dateTo
string <date>

数据日期截止

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/data/resources/export/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/data/resources/export/

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "请求参数错误"
}

操作单个存量数据

支持更新启停状态、保存默认可视化方案、配置访问用户组和删除确认。目标数据必须对当前用户可见或由当前用户上传；不可见数据按不存在处理；超级管理员不受对象可见范围限制。启停、默认可视化和普通编辑需要 catalog.change_dataresource；删除需要 catalog.delete_dataresource；数据上传者本人或具备 catalog.change_dataresource 的用户可以通过 updateAccess 修改可见范围。可手动配置的数据访问角色列表不会返回超级管理员角色，后端仍会强制保留超级管理员访问范围。成功操作会写入审计日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
id
required
integer

资源 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
action
required
string
Enum: "update" "setStatus" "saveVisualization" "updateAccess" "updateInventoryGroup" "delete"

操作类型

status
string
Enum: "active" "inactive"

setStatus 或 update 时写入的数据资源状态

object (AdminDataResourceVisualization)
accessGroupIds
Array of integers

updateAccess 或 update 时写入的额外可见用户组 ID 列表；调用方不能选择超级管理员用户组，后端会强制补齐超级管理员用户组，上传者本人不依赖用户组也始终可见。包含游客用户组时表示未登录用户可通过游客会话访问该数据。

inventoryGroupId
integer or null

updateInventoryGroup 或 update 时写入的存量数据内容组别 ID；为 null 时表示移入默认分组

confirmationName
string

delete 操作要求传入与数据资源名称完全一致的确认文本

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/data/resources/{id}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/data/resources/{id}/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "action": "update",
  • "status": "active",
  • "visualization": {
    • "layerName": "string",
    • "defaultVisible": true,
    • "defaultOpacity": 100,
    • "symbolization": {
      • "opacity": 100,
      • "pointMode": "circle",
      • "renderer": {
        • "type": "single",
        • "templateId": "string",
        • "businessType": "string",
        • "updatedByUser": true
        },
      • "circle": { },
      • "symbol": { },
      • "heatmap": { },
      • "cluster": { },
      • "line": { },
      • "fill": { }
      },
    • "rasterRules": { }
    },
  • "accessGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "inventoryGroupId": 0,
  • "confirmationName": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "code": "string",
  • "dataType": "vector",
  • "category": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "type": "string",
    • "code": "string",
    • "name": "string"
    },
  • "source": "string",
  • "provider": "string",
  • "dataDate": "2019-08-24",
  • "spatialExtent": "string",
  • "coordinateSystem": "string",
  • "fileFormat": "string",
  • "storagePath": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "qualityNote": "string",
  • "defaultVisualization": { },
  • "sizeBytes": 0,
  • "itemCount": 0,
  • "status": "active",
  • "inventoryGroupId": 0,
  • "accessGroups": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "isGuest": true,
      • "isSuperadmin": true
      }
    ],
  • "canManageAccess": true,
  • "maintainer": "string",
  • "uploader": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string"
    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "defaultLayer": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "code": "string",
    • "layerType": "vector",
    • "geometryType": "point",
    • "defaultVisible": true,
    • "defaultOpacity": 100,
    • "symbolization": {
      • "opacity": 100,
      • "pointMode": "circle",
      • "renderer": {
        • "type": "single",
        • "templateId": "string",
        • "businessType": "string",
        • "updatedByUser": true
        },
      • "circle": { },
      • "symbol": { },
      • "heatmap": { },
      • "cluster": { },
      • "line": { },
      • "fill": { }
      },
    • "rasterRules": { },
    • "isActive": true
    }
}

获取工程专题管理列表

返回工程和专题管理列表，支持按类型、状态和关键词筛选。需要 catalog.view_workspacescene、catalog.change_workspacescene 或 catalog.delete_workspacescene；后端仍需按对象所有者和访问用户组裁剪可见范围。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
q
string

按工程专题名称、说明或所属用户进行快速检索

kind
string
Enum: "project" "topic"

工程专题类型筛选

status
string
Enum: "active" "inactive"

工程专题状态筛选

current
integer >= 1

当前页码

pageSize
integer >= 1

每页条数

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/workspaces/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/workspaces/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "kind": "project",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "snapshot": { },
      • "owner": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "username": "string",
        • "displayName": "string"
        },
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "status": "active",
      • "accessGroups": [
        • {
          • "id": 0,
          • "name": "string",
          • "isGuest": true,
          • "isSuperadmin": true
          }
        ],
      • "canManageAccess": true
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0,
  • "availableAccessGroups": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "isGuest": true,
      • "isSuperadmin": true
      }
    ]
}

操作单个工程专题

支持更新工程专题状态、基础信息、访问用户组和删除确认。启停和信息修改需要 catalog.change_workspacescene；删除需要 catalog.delete_workspacescene；拥有者或具备 catalog.change_workspacescene 的用户可以通过 updateAccess 修改可见范围。成功操作会写入审计日志。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
workspaceId
required
integer

工程专题 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
action
required
string
Enum: "update" "setStatus" "updateAccess" "delete"

操作类型

status
string
Enum: "active" "inactive"

setStatus 或 update 时写入的工程专题状态

kind
string
Enum: "project" "topic"

update 时写入的工程专题类型

name
string

update 时写入的工程专题名称

description
string

update 时写入的工程专题说明

accessGroupIds
Array of integers

updateAccess 或 update 时写入的额外可见用户组 ID 列表；非超级管理员主体不能选择超级管理员用户组，后端会强制补齐超级管理员用户组，所属用户本人始终可见。包含游客用户组时表示未登录用户可通过游客会话访问该工程专题。

confirmationName
string

delete 操作要求传入与工程专题名称完全一致的确认文本

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/admin/workspaces/{workspaceId}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/admin/workspaces/{workspaceId}/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "action": "update",
  • "status": "active",
  • "kind": "project",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "accessGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "confirmationName": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "kind": "project",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "snapshot": { },
  • "owner": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "username": "string",
    • "displayName": "string"
    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "status": "active",
  • "accessGroups": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "isGuest": true,
      • "isSuperadmin": true
      }
    ],
  • "canManageAccess": true
}

认证授权

获取用户头像图片

返回指定用户已上传的头像图片。需要登录态；用户不存在或未设置数据库头像时返回标准 JSON 错误。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
integer

用户 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/users/{userId}/avatar/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/users/{userId}/avatar/

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "detail": "请先登录"
}

用户管理

获取用户列表

返回可配置用户及其用户组归属。非超级管理员主体不会返回超级管理员用户。需要 core.manage_auth。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/users/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/users/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "username": "string",
      • "displayName": "string",
      • "email": "string",
      • "avatarUrl": "string",
      • "department": "string",
      • "isStaff": true,
      • "isSuperuser": true,
      • "roles": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "permissions": {
        • "canAccessAdmin": true,
        • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
        • "canCreateUser": true,
        • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
        • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
        • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
        • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
        • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
        • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
        • "canManageDataBackup": true,
        • "canManageAuth": true,
        • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
        • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
        • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
        • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
        • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
        • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
        • "canViewDataOverview": true,
        • "canBrowseData": true,
        • "canQueryData": true,
        • "canUploadData": true,
        • "canViewDataResources": true,
        • "canCreateDataResources": true,
        • "canChangeDataResources": true,
        • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
        • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
        • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
        • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
        • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
        • "canExportData": true,
        • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
        • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
        • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
        • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
        • "canManageRasterData": true
        },
      • "groupIds": [
        • 0
        ],
      • "isActive": true,
      • "groupPermissions": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "directPermissions": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "disabledPermissions": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "effectivePermissions": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "operationLogGroupIds": [
        • 0
        ]
      }
    ]
}

创建用户

具备 core.manage_auth 和 core.create_user 权限的管理员创建用户账号，创建时必须指定至少一个非超级管理员用户组。密码由后端自动生成并返回。该接口不受自助注册开关影响。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
username
required
string

登录用户名

displayName
string

显示名称

email
string <email>

用户邮箱

department
string

用户所在部门

groupIds
required
Array of integers non-empty

初始所属用户组 ID 列表，必填且至少包含一个非超级管理员用户组

isActive
boolean

是否启用账号，默认 true

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/users/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/users/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "username": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "department": "string",
  • "groupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "isActive": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "username": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "isStaff": true,
  • "isSuperuser": true,
  • "roles": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "permissions": {
    • "canAccessAdmin": true,
    • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
    • "canCreateUser": true,
    • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
    • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
    • "canManageDataBackup": true,
    • "canManageAuth": true,
    • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
    • "canViewDataOverview": true,
    • "canBrowseData": true,
    • "canQueryData": true,
    • "canUploadData": true,
    • "canViewDataResources": true,
    • "canCreateDataResources": true,
    • "canChangeDataResources": true,
    • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
    • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
    • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
    • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
    • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
    • "canExportData": true,
    • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
    • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
    • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
    • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
    • "canManageRasterData": true
    },
  • "groupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "isActive": true,
  • "groupPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "directPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "operationLogGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "generatedPassword": "string"
}

更新用户所属用户组

为指定用户设置所属用户组。普通用户必须保留至少一个用户组，非超级管理员主体不能看到或选择超级管理员用户组，不能修改超级管理员用户；当前登录用户的用户组不能在认证授权页修改。需要 core.manage_auth。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
integer

用户 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
groupIds
required
Array of integers non-empty

用户新的用户组 ID 列表，普通用户至少保留一个用户组

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/users/{userId}/groups/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/users/{userId}/groups/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "groupIds": [
    • 0
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "username": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "isStaff": true,
  • "isSuperuser": true,
  • "roles": [
    • "string"
    ],

    • "canAccessAdmin": true,
    • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
    • "canCreateUser": true,
    • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
    • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
    • "canManageDataBackup": true,
    • "canManageAuth": true,
    • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
    • "canViewDataOverview": true,
    • "canBrowseData": true,
    • "canQueryData": true,
    • "canUploadData": true,
    • "canViewDataResources": true,
    • "canCreateDataResources": true,
    • "canChangeDataResources": true,
    • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
    • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
    • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
    • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
    • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
    • "canExportData": true,
    • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
    • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
    • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
    • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
    • "canManageRasterData": true
    },
  • "groupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "isActive": true,
  • "groupPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "directPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "operationLogGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ]
}

更新用户功能权限

为指定用户设置单独授予权限和单独关闭权限。最终生效权限为角色权限与用户直授权限合并后，再扣除用户单独关闭权限；当前登录用户不能在认证授权页修改自己的权限，应通过用户设置调整主动关闭权限。非超级管理员主体不能看到或配置超级管理员用户，也不能将超级管理员角色配置为可查看日志角色。需要 core.manage_auth 和 core.manage_feature_permissions。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
integer

用户 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
directPermissions
required
Array of strings

单独授予该用户的平台功能权限列表，必须全部来自 availablePermissions

disabledPermissions
Array of strings

单独关闭该用户的平台功能权限列表，必须全部来自 availablePermissions；后端只保存该用户已授予权限中的关闭项

operationLogGroupIds
Array of integers

该用户具备 core.view_group_operation_logs 时允许查看日志的目标用户组 ID 列表；空数组表示未配置指定用户组

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/users/{userId}/permissions/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/users/{userId}/permissions/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "directPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "operationLogGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "username": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "isStaff": true,
  • "isSuperuser": true,
  • "roles": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "permissions": {
    • "canAccessAdmin": true,
    • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
    • "canCreateUser": true,
    • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
    • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
    • "canManageDataBackup": true,
    • "canManageAuth": true,
    • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
    • "canViewDataOverview": true,
    • "canBrowseData": true,
    • "canQueryData": true,
    • "canUploadData": true,
    • "canViewDataResources": true,
    • "canCreateDataResources": true,
    • "canChangeDataResources": true,
    • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
    • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
    • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
    • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
    • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
    • "canExportData": true,
    • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
    • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
    • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
    • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
    • "canManageRasterData": true
    },
  • "groupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "isActive": true,
  • "groupPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "directPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "operationLogGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ]
}

重置用户密码

为指定用户生成随机新密码并立即生效。新密码规则与后台创建用户时一致，响应中的 generatedPassword 仅返回一次。不能重置当前登录用户密码；非超级管理员主体不能看到或重置超级管理员用户。需要 core.manage_auth。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
integer

用户 ID

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/users/{userId}/password/reset/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/users/{userId}/password/reset/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "username": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "isStaff": true,
  • "isSuperuser": true,
  • "roles": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "permissions": {
    • "canAccessAdmin": true,
    • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
    • "canCreateUser": true,
    • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
    • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
    • "canManageDataBackup": true,
    • "canManageAuth": true,
    • "canViewDashboardResourceCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
    • "canViewDataOverview": true,
    • "canBrowseData": true,
    • "canQueryData": true,
    • "canUploadData": true,
    • "canViewDataResources": true,
    • "canCreateDataResources": true,
    • "canChangeDataResources": true,
    • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
    • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
    • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
    • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
    • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
    • "canExportData": true,
    • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
    • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
    • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
    • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
    • "canManageRasterData": true
    },
  • "groupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "isActive": true,
  • "groupPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "directPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "operationLogGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "generatedPassword": "string"
}

更新用户状态或删除用户

根据请求体中的 action 字段执行不同操作：

  • 不提供 action：启用或停用指定用户账号
  • delete：删除指定用户账号

不能操作当前登录用户或初始化管理员；非超级管理员主体不能看到或操作超级管理员用户。需要 core.manage_auth。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
integer

用户 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
isActive
required
boolean

用户账号是否启用

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/users/{userId}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/users/{userId}/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "isActive": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "username": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "avatarUrl": "string",
  • "department": "string",
  • "isStaff": true,
  • "isSuperuser": true,
  • "roles": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "permissions": {
    • "canAccessAdmin": true,
    • "canManageFeaturePermissions": true,
    • "canCreateUser": true,
    • "canViewOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewAllOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewOwnOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewGroupOperationLogs": true,
    • "canViewSystemLogs": true,
    • "canManageSystemSettings": true,
    • "canManageDataBackup": true,
    • "canManageAuth": true,

    • "canViewDashboardLayerCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardRasterCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardUserCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardActiveUsersCard": true,
    • "canViewDashboardSystemCard": true,
    • "canViewDataOverview": true,
    • "canBrowseData": true,
    • "canQueryData": true,
    • "canUploadData": true,
    • "canViewDataResources": true,
    • "canCreateDataResources": true,
    • "canChangeDataResources": true,
    • "canDeleteDataResources": true,
    • "canLoadVectorLayer": true,
    • "canLoadRasterLayer": true,
    • "canUseCustomSymbolization": true,
    • "canUseAiInterpretation": true,
    • "canExportData": true,
    • "canViewWorkspaces": true,
    • "canCreateWorkspaces": true,
    • "canChangeWorkspaces": true,
    • "canDeleteWorkspaces": true,
    • "canManageRasterData": true
    },
  • "groupIds": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "isActive": true,

    • "string"
    ],
  • "directPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "disabledPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "effectivePermissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "operationLogGroupIds": [
    • 0
    ]
}

获取用户组列表

返回当前主体可见的 Django 用户组及其功能权限配置，并确保内置角色（超级管理员、平台管理员、科研用户、普通用户、游客）存在。非超级管理员主体不会返回超级管理员用户组。需要 core.manage_auth。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/groups/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/groups/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "name": "string",
      • "userCount": 0,
      • "permissions": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "isProtected": true,
      • "lockedPermissions": [
        • "string"
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "availablePermissions": [
    • {
      • "id": "core.view_operation_logs",
      • "label": "查看操作日志",
      • "group": "后台权限"
      }
    ]
}

创建用户组

新增一个用户组并可同步设置功能权限。需要 core.manage_auth 和 core.manage_feature_permissions。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string

新用户组名称

permissions
Array of strings

新用户组授予的平台功能权限列表

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/groups/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/groups/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "permissions": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "userCount": 0,
  • "permissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "isProtected": true,
  • "lockedPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

更新或删除用户组

根据请求体中的 action 字段执行不同操作：

  • 不提供 action：更新用户组名称和功能权限
  • delete：删除空用户组（仅当用户组没有任何关联用户且不是内置角色时允许）

非超级管理员主体不能看到、更新或删除超级管理员用户组。超级管理员、平台管理员、科研用户、普通用户和游客属于系统内置角色，不能删除或重命名；其中只有超级管理员的权限集合被系统锁定为全量权限，其他内置角色允许调整权限。需要 core.manage_auth。删除仍有关联用户的角色、删除/重命名内置角色、或关闭超级管理员锁定权限时返回 400 ErrorResponse。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
path Parameters
groupId
required
integer

用户组 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
name
string

更新后的用户组名称

permissions
Array of strings

更新后的平台功能权限列表

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/groups/{groupId}/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/groups/{groupId}/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "permissions": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "userCount": 0,
  • "permissions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "isProtected": true,
  • "lockedPermissions": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

种质资源

获取种质资源基础清单

返回当前用户可见的种质资源基础清单，支持按关键词、物种、采集地点和核心资源标记筛选。该接口读取标准化种质资源数据库架子，不直接扫描原始 Excel；需要 core.browse_data。无数据时返回空数组。

Authorizations:
sessionAuth
query Parameters
q
string

按种质编号、样品编号、采集地点、备注模糊检索

taxon
string

按物种中文名或拉丁名模糊检索

site
string

按采集地点名称模糊检索

isCore
boolean

是否只返回核心种质资源

current
integer >= 1

当前页码

pageSize
integer >= 1

每页条数

Responses

开发环境

http://localhost:8000/api/germplasm/accessions/

生产环境

https://api.huyang.example.com/api/germplasm/accessions/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "accessionCode": "string",
      • "sampleCode": "string",
      • "taxon": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "nameCn": "string",
        • "scientificName": "string"
        },
      • "sourceSite": {
        • "id": 0,
        • "name": "string",
        • "longitude": 0,
        • "latitude": 0,
        • "altitude": 0
        },
      • "materialType": "string",
      • "resourceType": "string",
      • "sex": "string",
      • "isCore": true,
      • "storageStatus": "string",
      • "sourceResourceId": 0,
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0,
  • "current": 1,
  • "pageSize": 1
}
